name: python3-typeguard
title: python3-typeguard
description:
Run-time type checker for Python
This library provides run-time type checking for functions defined with
argument type annotations. This can be done in one of three ways:
* calling check_argument_types() from within the function body
* decorating the function with @typechecked
* using `with TypeChecker('packagename')`
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-typeguard because Run-time type checker for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-typeguard as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-typeguard with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-typeguard --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
